_doc: Single source of truth for which context this repo runs as (meta = framework repo authoring the templates; downstream = materialised project consuming the framework). Read by Factory-pr-review Phase 0 (coherence audit) and by any future consumer that needs context-aware behaviour. To extend: bump version, add keys under audit.* — never break existing keys.

lock_step_pairs.doc: Hook scripts must mirror between meta .claude/hooks/ and template tree.
Settings JSON must mirror between meta and template tree (merge-preserve in template).
Governance scripts (governance-onedit, governance-onprompt, governance-oncompact) must mirror between meta scripts/ and template scripts/ trees.

Universal CLAUDE.md clauses (Communication Style, RDR Universal, Governance Scope, Pre-Action Gate, Invariants, Core Protocols) must be byte-identical between root CLAUDE.md and the template counterpart. Context-specific sections (triage default, framework_version invariant) legitimately diverge — see CLAUDE.md § What Lives Where.

Factory-* skills + Factory-*.instructions.md ship from meta directly to downstream via factory-sync.sh — no template intermediary. Lock-step at meta level = no drift to detect; lock-step at downstream level = files match meta as of last sync. For meta context, this declaration is informational; the audit does NOT flag missing template counterparts for these paths.
